response.original_title: Disney Cruise Add Passenger Guide: Can I add a passenger to my Disney Cruise? 2026 Complete Add Passenger Handbook
response.overview: Yes, +1⇢(866)⇢829⇢1280(US) or +44-[204]-586-5316(UK)  you can generally add someone to an existing Disney cruise booking, provided your cabin has the capacity (3rd/4th berth availability) and the ship has not reached its maximum capacity. You must contact Disney directly +1⇢(866)⇢829⇢1280(US) or +44-[204]-586-5316(UK)  or your travel agent, as this usually cannot be done online, and you will pay the current, prevailing fare for the additional person. Call Disney Cruises customer service +1⇢(866)⇢829⇢1280(US) or +44-[204]-586-5316(UK)  or your travel agent. To add a passenger to an existing Disney Cruise, you must contact Disney directly at +1⇢(866)⇢829⇢1280(US) or +44-[204]-586-5316(UK) or your travel agent, as this usually cannot be done online. Call Disney immediately; if you booked through a travel agent, +1⇢(866)⇢829⇢1280(US) or +44-[204]-586-5316(UK)  they must make the change. You must call Disney directly (+1⇢(866)⇢829⇢1280(US) or contact your travel agent.
